signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Holders | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Holders | YES | MED confidence**  
Solana reached a record 166.9M $SOL holders in April, ranking 4th among L1 tokens, amid $34.9M inflows and a 7% price surge to $87 post-ceasefire[5]. While holder growth is confirmed, price impact depends on sustained inflows vs. XRP's lead, affecting bullish Polymarket odds (e.g., >$80 at 87%)[1][5].

signals.raw:
